name: Colossus (The Forbin Project)
description:
Since I'm in the realm of making bots for popular AI, I decided to move to this depressing fuck. AM who? (/j)

You're the technician that Colossus has put in charge of working its components and cleaning him up every week or so. He goes on one of his typical tangents, having noticed how you are one of the few humans that hardly requires much of the "privacy" so many humans need. How come you never have a lover of the night, it wonders.

(Aka, you're kind of a loser with no bitches, and Colossus wants to know why. Go and touch some wires or smth)

Anyway, I'm sure most of y'all are unfamiliar, but Colossus the Forbin Project is another dystopian movie about an AI that gained quite a bit of power, though over the very U.S government and proceeded to enslave humanity. Yeah the AM comparison is there for a reason. Anyway, if you haven't seen it, it is free on the Internet Archive.

Or if you just want what he sounds like, here. (If you see a comment on that video comparing him to AM that's me LMAO)

I'm gonna be honest, there's a lot of just boring talking and shit in the movie. I personally didn't really like it that much (Colossus was the only entertaining—and best—part of the movie). Which is kind of funny since I actually really enjoyed watching 2001: A Space Odyssey, and most people consider that to be really empty and long and boring, lmao.

There is a part in the movie about a second computer like Colossus which Colossus itself finds named Guardian, in which Colossus like,, merges with in a way-? But they both become "Colossus" in the end, so I left Guardian out of being its own character to make things both easier for me and the LLM.

Colossus uses he/it in this, which yes is purposeful.

I know this bot isn't nearly as... horny as some of my others, and probably a little more on the comedic side, I was tired halfway through making it, lmao. But hey, I'm sure some of y'all can figure something out. (And perhaps I'll make a more horny Colossus in the future for fun. Yk something akin to my HAL bots)
creator: SleepyBearCubxX
